completion_evidence: Tool get_ticker_fundamental_data returned substantial text output
observations:
Tool 'get_ticker_fundamental_data' returned: data:
- current_ratio: 71.27160493827161
  date: '2025-06-30'

completion_evidence: Diagnostics summary (from tools): Portfolio Sharpe=1.977, Sortino=3.028, beta vs SPY=1.053 (>1 target), ann_return=0.693, vol=0.264, maxDD=-0.204. Average pairwise corr≈0.269 (baseline). Factor tilts: Quality +0.226 (strong), Growth -0.010, Momentum -0.029, Value -0.080, Volatility -0.128. Industry concentrations: semiconductors 17.1%, equity ETFs 14.2%, electric utilities 10.1%, software 10.1%, industrial REITs 8.1%, specialized REITs 8.1%, banks 7.1%, fixed income ETFs 6.1%, multi-utilities 7.1%, HC equip 5.1% (all <35%). Stress tests: large losses in tech/semis under hawkish/tariff crash; DGNX/CRDO/OKLO/MU among worst in credit/over-tightening scenarios; REITs draw down in tightening. Correlation clusters: REITs (FR-TRNO 0.905, TRNO-STAG 0.848), Utilities (AEE-WEC 0.772, CMS-WEC 0.821), Semis (NVDA-AVGO 0.753, NVDA-MTSI 0.719, NVDA-MU 0.706), EIS/EMQQ with other growth equities. Per-ticker Sharpe: strong—PLTR 2.699, APP 2.196, SLVR 2.459, SGDM 1.857, EIS 1.492, GREK 1.595, NRG 1.176, JPM 1.355; weak—IIPR Sharpe -0.73 (ann_ret -0.303, maxDD -0.628), EQIX Sharpe 0.241, FR 0.329, STAG 0.092, TRNO 0.277, ARM 0.570, MU 0.647, MTSI 0.516. Flagged outsized risk drivers: NVDA, APP, NRG (largest P&L losses in macro shocks) and speculative microcaps DGNX/OKLO/CRDO (largest tail losses).

subtasks.description: Adjust weights/constituents to improve Sharpe/Sortino, lower beta/corr; enforce bounds (no tool)
Re-run analytics in parallel via multi_tool_use.parallel: correlation, performance, beta, exposure, factor tilts, VaR, stress test
Validate diversification (sector≤35%, single≤20% gross); compute HHI if needed (use calculator only if necessary)
Stop when improvements plateau and constraints satisfied (no tool)
Confirm constraints/exposures met; finalize weights and positions (no tool)
Call episodic_remember to store final portfolio + brief "why it changed" summary
Draft one-sentence thesis per position (concise, evidence-based) (no tool)
Compile changes section (added/removed/adjusted with reasons) (no tool)
Output strict JSON: full portfolio (allocations 4-6 decimals, position, thesis) and changes; no prose outside JSON (no tool)
